title: Pombalia sylvicola
taxonomy: Pombalia sylvicola is a species of plant in the family Achariaceae. It is a flowering plant native to Brazil. The classification of Pombalia sylvicola includes the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. Within the family Achariaceae, Pombalia sylvicola is placed in the genus Pombalia. Further classification within the genus is not well established.
